findings.title: CP00-127 closeout manifest and plan-pack entry are external to this diff
findings.evidence: Validator reads docs/closeout-packs/cp00-127/manifest.json via readJsonIfExists and resolves cp127PlanPack from closeoutPlan.packs.find(...) or the manifest snapshot, then calls requirePlanPackUnitMatch(cp127PlanPack, ...) with required defaulting true. Neither the per-pack manifest nor a closeout-pack-plan.json update is present in this diff.
findings.recommendation: Confirm closeout-pack-plan.json already enumerates CP00-127 with range RP02.P07.M05.S17-RP02.P07.M06.S04 so the plan-pack unit match resolves; the per-pack manifest is normally produced during the closeout step. Informational only; does not affect the code/contract boundary verification and does not block closeout.

parsed_review.recommendation: Approve. The pack closes the planned Risk A failure taxonomy permission/audit test evidence and synthetic fixture opening slice within scope, with all required no-write and reference-only boundaries enforced and asserted.
parsed_review.rationale: Scope is fully satisfied. The new packages/authz/src/failure-taxonomy-test-fixture-boundary.js binds exactly 10 units across two micro phases (RP02.P07.M05.S17-S22 permission/audit test evidence and RP02.P07.M06.S01-S04 synthetic fixture opening), covering all ten required behaviors: failure taxonomy, missing tenant/actor/Matter failures, failure unit test, failure integration smoke, audit failure hint, Hermes failure evidence, Claude edge-case prompt, and human escalation note. CP126 inheritance is genuine (imports and calls createPermissionKernelCp126FailureTaxonomyWorkflowBinding plus two case lookups; validation enforces inherited_workflow_result_count===40 and the unit-test/Hermes reference-only bindings). Synthetic-only/metadata-only is preserved (synthetic_only/no_real_data true, fixture_contains_real_data false). Unit test and integration smoke are deterministic and non-persisting (permission_audit_test_evidence.deterministic true, persisted false; replay_persists_state false). Audit hint and Hermes evidence are preview/reference-only (emitted_to_audit_ledger false, writes_hermes_runtime false). Claude prompt rows are read-only and executes_claude_review false; human escalation grants_human_approval false. Synthetic fixture opening fails closed for missing tenant/actor/Matter (missing_*_denied true, fail_closed true, fixture_persisted false) and unknown cases block before evaluation. No runtime UI/API routes, permission-policy mutation, audit/product/database writes, idempotency persistence, locks, retry/rollback/compensation, export/share, AI/analytics, LDIP, or HRX split appear anywhere; all 19 no_write_attestation flags are false in both the source module and the contract JSON, the validate script asserts each, and the suite verifies the no-write/leak-free invariant across all case results. Contract bump (v0.20->v0.21), current_pack switch to CP00-127, production_ready_flag, 11 public exports, 10 hidden source fields, deliverable/domain counts (test 2, security_audit 1, hermes_evidence 1, claude_review 1, implementation 1, failure_recovery 4), and handoff to CP00-128 / RP02.P07.M06.S05 are internally consistent. The single P3 is an informational note that the closeout manifest and plan entry live outside this diff.
